items.title: How much gold is in an Olympic gold medal, and how much is it worth?
items.description: Olympic medals have what's known as a "melt value." But they're worth far more financially than their mineral contents, an auction expert notes.

items.title: Why importing more beef from Argentina won't ease costs for U.S. consumers
items.description: Taming runaway U.S. beef prices will require more than stepping up imports, economists said. Here's the key to cutting costs.
